Error.Message: Server failed to authenticate the request. Make sure the value of Authorization header is formed correctly including the signature. RequestId:49204b1c-d01e-0039-1fdf-d79a73000000 Time:2026-04-29T13:54:43.4362999Z
Error.AuthenticationErrorDetail: Signed expiry time [Fri, 20 Nov 2020 08:09:07 GMT] must be after signed start time [Wed, 29 Apr 2026 13:54:43 GMT]
